🏥 Proudly serving Victoria Hospital & LHSC staff, London ON

A Clean Home.
A Stronger
Community.

ClearPath Cleaning Co. was founded through the PEPP (Placement & Employment Pathways Program) — a London-area initiative that supports individuals in building meaningful, lasting careers through community-rooted employment. Every booking directly empowers a program participant.

✦ About the PEPP Program

PEPP helps participants gain real-world skills, sustainable income, and confidence through supported employment. Hiring ClearPath means your clean home also fuels a stronger local economy.

We are particularly proud to serve the dedicated staff of Victoria Hospital, University Hospital, St. Joseph's Health Care, Parkwood Institute, and the Children's Hospital — healthcare professionals who give everything on shift and deserve to come home to a spotless, peaceful space.

  • 200+Happy Clients
  • 5 ★Avg. Rating
  • 100%Insured & Bonded
  • PEPPCertified Team

Services Built Around Your Life

We know healthcare schedules don't follow a 9-to-5. That's why every ClearPath service is flexible, reliable, and designed to fit around your shifts — from a weekly tidy to a full move-out deep clean.

  • Standard Home Clean
    Kitchen, bathrooms, living areas, vacuuming & mopping. Ideal for weekly or bi-weekly upkeep.
  • Deep Clean
    Top-to-bottom: inside appliances, baseboards, window sills & hard-to-reach areas. Perfect for a first visit.
  • Post-Shift Express
    A focused 2-hour tidy for healthcare workers coming off a long shift. Kitchen, bathroom & living essentials.
  • Move In / Move Out
    Complete cleaning before or after a move — inside cupboards, all surfaces & appliances.
  • Eco-Friendly Clean
    All-natural, fragrance-free, low-VOC products — ideal for sensitivities or a greener home.
  • Recurring Packages
    Weekly, bi-weekly or monthly plans with discounted rates. Set it and forget it.
Most Popular
Standard
Home Clean

Weekly / bi-weekly maintenance package. Great value for busy professionals.

Hospital Staff Special
Post-Shift Express

2-hour focused clean. Show your hospital badge for a discounted rate.

Green Option
Eco-Friendly

Fragrance-free, plant-based products. Safe for allergy sufferers & children.

Best Value
Recurring
Monthly Package

Commit to monthly cleans and save. No lock-in contracts — cancel anytime.

  • Book a Service
  • Why Choose Us

Why Healthcare
Professionals
Trust Us

We're not a franchise. We're neighbours who genuinely care about our community, trained to the same hygiene standards that inform healthcare environments.

Community Impact

Every booking with ClearPath directly supports a PEPP program participant — creating local jobs, building careers, and strengthening London's community economy. You're not just paying for a clean home; you're investing in someone's future.

  • PEPP-trained team members
  • 100% London-based staff
  • Fully background-checked
  • Fully insured & bonded

Built for Shift Workers

We understand the demands of healthcare. Early morning, evening, and weekend appointments available — so a clean home is always within reach, no matter your rotation.

  • Early-morning slots (6 AM+)
  • Evening availability
  • Flexible rescheduling
  • Hospital badge discount

Hospital-Grade Standards

Our cleaning protocols are informed by infection-control principles — high-touch surfaces, proper disinfectant dwell times, and colour-coded cloths to prevent cross-contamination.

  • Hospital-grade disinfectants
  • Satisfaction guaranteed
  • Free re-clean if not happy
  • No hidden fees, ever

Loved by Hospital Staff

Don't just take our word for it. Here's what nurses, paramedics, and physicians in London are saying about ClearPath.

★★★★★
"Coming home to a spotless apartment after a 12-hour shift at Victoria Hospital genuinely changed my life. These folks are professional, thorough, and just really kind people."
Sarah K. — RN, Victoria Hospital
★★★★★
"I appreciate that they use fragrance-free products without me even having to ask. As a nurse, that matters. Reliable, friendly, and so easy to book."
David M. — Paramedic, LHSC
★★★★★
"What I love most is knowing my money supports the PEPP program. It's a local, social enterprise that deserves every bit of support — and they clean brilliantly."
Patricia L. — Physician, St. Joseph's Health Care
★★★★★
"The post-shift express package is a lifesaver. I get home at 11 PM and wake up to a clean kitchen and bathroom. Absolutely worth every penny."
James T. — ICU Nurse, University Hospital
  • Book Your Clean Today

Serving London's Healthcare Community

We go where you live. ClearPath serves all residential neighbourhoods within London, Ontario — with a special focus on areas close to the city's major hospital campuses.

  • Victoria Hospital
  • University Hospital
  • St. Joseph's Health Care
  • Parkwood Institute
  • Children's Hospital
  • Byron
  • Old South
  • Wortley Village
  • White Oaks
  • Westmount
  • Masonville
  • Downtown Core
🏥 Hospital Staff Perk

Show your hospital ID or employment badge when booking and receive a discounted rate on your first clean. This is our small way of saying thank you to the people who keep our city healthy.

Not sure if we cover your area? Reach out — we're always expanding. Same-week bookings may be available for healthcare workers coming off extended rotations.

Book Your Clean

Ready for a cleaner home and more time to rest? Fill out the form below and we'll confirm your appointment within 24 hours. Healthcare staff — remember to mention your hospital for your staff discount!
